text  
the number of pages read each day follows a quadratic sequence  
the formula for the number of pages read on the n-th day is p(n) = n² + 3n + 1  
the total number of pages read by the end of the 30 days is 30² + 3*30 + 1 = 900 + 90 + 1 = 991  
the children will read a total of 991 pages over the 30 days
